posts.author: ArthurJ
posts.title: Merit vs. Race: Justice Department Launches Investigations Into Admissions Policies Of 15 Medical Schools

link_metadata.description: The Trump Justice Department’s Civil Rights Division has opened 15 new investigations into possible race discrimination in medical school admissions, the department announced Thursday. The purpose of the investigations is to ensure medical schools that receive federal taxpayer funding are in compliance with federal law to “ensure the students become doctors based on their merit, not their race,” the department said.
link_metadata.title: Merit vs. Race: Justice Department Launches Investigations Into Admissions Policies Of 15 Medical Schools - Connecticut Centinal
